About Me

Curious student.
Passionate builder.

I'm a BTech student with a strong interest in how technology shapes the world — from software that solves real problems to the machines that drive human progress. I enjoy staying at the edge of what's new, whether that's a breakthrough in AI or an exciting new car model.

Outside the screen, I follow the automobile industry closely — EVs, performance cars, and the engineering behind them genuinely fascinate me. I believe in learning every day and building things that matter.
